summary: Completed comprehensive testing of center-based lighting system implementation. All core functionality verified working including WebGL lighting engine, CSS radial gradient overlay, dashboard layout integrity, and content counts.
passed_tests: Visual engine canvas loads successfully on login and dashboard pages
Lighting overlay div present with data-testid='lighting-overlay'
CSS radial gradient background applied for center-based lighting
Dashboard layout intact: top-bar, left-column, ai-core-placeholder, right-column
All content counts correct: 3 attention items, 3 projects, 4 trades, 4 schedule items, 4 urgent tasks, 4 financial stats
WebGL lighting system working: T element with point lights (intensity 8 + 3), ambient light (0.4), strengthened vignette (darkness 0.8)
UI components properly rendered with visual hierarchy
Login page loads with visual engine active
